case_title: BRITTANY HUTZ VS. DEIRDRE SUE LISTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,300.00 FILED BY HUTZ, BRITTANY AS TO DEFENDANT LISTER, DEIRDRE SUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-05-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LISTER, DEIRDRE SUE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUTZ, BRITTANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LISTER, DEIRDRE SUE $5,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,475.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2008 - CONTINUED PER THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO DEC-04-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.
